Received a Schedule 13D from Tang Capital Management, reporting a 6.8% stake (14,292,813 ADSs). The filing follows Nano Dimension's DEFC14A filed on June 25, 2026, indicating an active proxy contest. Tang Capital is a known activist investor.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · NHIC
item.ns0:headline: Merges with NewCleo in $2.4B SPAC deal; seeks Nasdaq listing under NWCL
item.description:
Merges with NewCleo in $2.4B SPAC deal; seeks Nasdaq listing under NWCL

Corp III, a SPAC, will merge with nuclear technology company NewCleo Ltd., valuing the combined company at approximately $2.4B (pre-money). The financing includes up to $220M from a PIPE and $209M from the SPAC's trust account. The post-merger entity will trade on Nasdaq under ticker 'NWCL' and fund NewCleo's reactor and fuel facility development.

About: NewHold Investment Corp III does not have significant operations. The company focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It intends to target industrial technology businesses. NewHold Investment Corp III was incorporated in 2024 and is based in New York, New York.

  • Counterparty: NewCleo Ltd.
  • Deal value: $2.4B
  • Consideration: stock
  • Expected Close: pending

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · NNDM
item.ns0:headline: Faces Murchinson proxy fight; vote July 31 on director slate + governance changes
item.description:
Faces Murchinson proxy fight; vote July 31 on director slate + governance changes

Faces a contested proxy solicitation from 9% shareholder Murchinson for the July 31 extraordinary general meeting. Murchinson seeks to remove three incumbent directors (Pons, Rosensweig, Stehlin) and appoint three nominees (Rozenbaum, Tarlow, Fruchthandler) to gain board control. Proposals also include declassifying the board, requiring shareholder approval for poison pills and major transactions over $50M.

item.title: 🎯 Tender · GNK
item.ns0:headline: Diana increases tender offer to $27.34/share (cash + DSX stock); financing extended
item.description:
Diana increases tender offer to $27.34/share (cash + DSX stock); financing extended

Diana Shipping Inc. (DSX) raised its unsolicited tender offer for Genco Shipping & Trading to $27.34 per share, consisting of $24.80 in cash plus one Diana share valued at $2.54—a 53% premium to Genco's undisturbed price. Diana extended its fully committed $1.412 billion financing facility, arranged by DNB Carnegie and Nordea with participation from multiple international banks, to support the acquisition. The offer remains open; Diana urges Genco shareholders to tender and seeks to negotiate with the board.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc. (DSX)
  • Offer price: $27.34
  • Premium: 53%
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-30

Px $24.39 · Mkt cap $1.03B · EV $1.30B · Fwd P/E 16.0x · Fwd EV/EBITDA 7.0x · Industrials / Marine Transportation

item.title: 💔 Busted · GETY
item.ns0:headline: Terminates Shutterstock merger; CMA condition rejected; seeks financing
item.description:
Terminates Shutterstock merger; CMA condition rejected; seeks financing

Getty Images Holdings' board terminated the merger with Shutterstock after rejecting the U.K. CMA's condition to sell Shutterstock's editorial business. The merger agreement will formally end on July 6, 2026 per the extended end date. Board will redeem its 10.500% senior secured notes due 2030 via special mandatory redemption and intends to retain a financial advisor for strategic financing alternatives.

About: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. provides creative and editorial visual content solutions in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia-Pacific. It offers creative, which includes royalty-free photos, illustrations, vectors, videos, and generative AI-services; editorial, which consists of photos and videos covering entertainment, sports, and news; and other products and services, such as music licensing, digital asset management, distribution services, print sales, and data access and/or…

  • Counterparty: Shutterstock

item.title: 🎯 Tender · Unsolicited · GNK
item.ns0:headline: Unsolicited $27.34/shr bid from Diana backed by extended financing to Sep 30
item.description:
Unsolicited $27.34/shr bid from Diana backed by extended financing to Sep 30

Remains the target of an unsolicited tender offer from Diana Shipping (DSX) at $27.34 per share, comprised of $24.80 cash plus one Diana share valued at $2.54. Diana extended its $1.412B fully committed financing to September 30, 2026, arranged by DNB Carnegie and Nordea with a syndicate of banks. The offer represents a 53% premium to GNK's undisturbed price and a 6% premium to NAV; Diana continues to urge Genco's board to negotiate, but no definitive agreement has been reached.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.
  • Offer price: 27.34
  • Deal value: 1.412 billion
  • Premium: 53%
  • Stake: 14.4%

item.ns0:headline: Receives preliminary going-private bid from OSN at $3.39/share
item.description:
Receives preliminary going-private bid from OSN at $3.39/share

Confirmed receipt of a preliminary, non-binding proposal from controlling shareholder OSN Streaming Limited to acquire all outstanding ordinary shares not already owned by OSN at $3.39 per share in cash. OSN currently owns approximately 67% of the outstanding shares. The board appointed three independent directors and formed a special committee to review and negotiate the proposal.

About: Anghami Inc. operates a music-streaming platform in the Middle East and North Africa. It offers digital entertainment and online streaming services, including music, podcasts, music videos, live events, movies, and series. The company also provides a library of approximately 18,000 hours of premium video, including HBO content; and approximately 100 million Arabic and international songs and podcasts. In addition, it offers various devices and payment methods.

item.ns0:headline: Sells Spire Storage to I Squared Capital for $607M cash + $50M deferred
item.description:
Sells Spire Storage to I Squared Capital for $607M cash + $50M deferred

Completed the sale of all membership interests of Belle Butte LLC, owner of natural gas storage assets in Wyoming and Oklahoma, to an affiliate of I Squared Capital for total consideration of $657 million ($607M cash at closing plus $50M fixed deferred payment due by September 30, 2027). Proceeds will partially fund the earlier acquisition of Piedmont Natural Gas Tennessee and support regulated utility operations and debt reduction. The transaction sharpens Spire's focus on its core regulated natural gas utility business.

About: Spire Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the purchase, retail distribution, and sale of natural gas to residential, commercial, industrial, and other end-users of natural gas in the United States. The company operates through three segments: Gas Utility, Gas Marketing, and Midstream. It is also involved in the marketing of natural gas and related services; and transportation and storage of natural gas.

item.description:

Entered into a $550M asset-based revolving credit agreement to refinance its existing facility and finance the Klöckner acquisition. The facility matures in 2031, with an option to increase by up to $200M or an additional $650M for the Klöckner acquisition. Proceeds will also be used for working capital and general corporate purposes.

The company offers carbon flat-rolled steel and tailor welded blanks, as well as automotive and electrical steel lamination stampings; and aluminum tailor welded blanks. It also offers warehousing, logistics, and materials management services. It serves automotive, construction, machinery and equipment, heavy truck, agriculture, and energy sectors. The transaction was initially announced December 18, 2025 and closed on June 30, 2026. Banistmo is no longer a subsidiary of Grupo Cibest.

About: Grupo Cibest S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services in Colombia and internationally. item.ns0:headline: Receives CE Mark for Optune Pax in locally advanced pancreatic cancer
item.description:
Receives CE Mark for Optune Pax in locally advanced pancreatic cancer

Announced CE Mark approval for Optune Pax (Tumor Treating Fields) for adult patients with locally advanced pancreatic cancer, based on Phase 3 PANOVA-3 trial. The trial met its primary endpoint with a statistically significant 2.0-month improvement in median overall survival (16.2 vs 14.2 months, HR 0.82, p=0.039) and a 6.1-month delay in pain progression. The CE Mark allows marketing in Europe; national access negotiations are next.

item.description:

Corporación América Airports' subsidiary Inframerica entered a Transition Amendment Agreement with ANAC, including a court-ordered fast-track tender for 100% of Inframerica shares by December 2026. CAAP holds 51% and intends to bid. The TAA also replaces fixed concession fees with variable fees, removes Infraero's 49% stake, adds 10 regional airports, and requires additional investments at Brasília Airport. If no bids, the amended concession automatically grants to Inframerica.

About: Corporación América Airports S.A., through its subsidiaries, acquires, develops, and operates airport concessions. It operates 52 airports in Latin America, Europe, and Eurasia. The company was formerly known as A.C.I. Airports International S.à r.l. and changed its name to Corporación América Airports S.A. in September 2017. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Luxembourg, Luxembourg. Corporación América Airports S.A. operates as a subsidiary of A.C.I. Airports S.à r.l.

item.description:

Braskem S.A. has initiated a mediation proceeding and filed a request for precautionary injunctive relief before the 2nd Bankruptcy and Judicial Reorganization Court of São Paulo to facilitate negotiations with its financial creditors. The goal is a consensual, structural, and orderly solution for its capital structure, aligned with the company's liquidity position and global petrochemical industry conditions. The restructuring is limited to financial creditors and does not affect suppliers, customers, or other stakeholders.

Acquires Klöckner & Co SE via €11.00/share cash tender; majority tendered

Worthington Steel's voluntary public cash takeover offer for Klöckner & Co SE at €11.00 per share has received tenders representing a majority of Kloeckner's outstanding share capital. The offer was launched in January 2026 under a business combination agreement. The transaction is progressing towards closing, with settlement and potential squeeze-out as next steps.

About: Worthington Steel, Inc. operates as a steel processor in North America. The company offers carbon flat-rolled steel and tailor welded blanks, as well as automotive and electrical steel lamination stampings; and aluminum tailor welded blanks. It also offers warehousing, logistics, and materials management services. It serves automotive, construction, machinery and equipment, heavy truck, agriculture, and energy sectors. The company was incorporated in 2023 and is headquartered in Columbus, Ohio.

  • Counterparty: Klöckner & Co SE
  • Offer price: €11.00 per share
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-01

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · FRMI
item.ns0:headline: Calls special meeting to elect 7 independent directors; seeks governance overhaul
item.description:
Calls special meeting to elect 7 independent directors; seeks governance overhaul

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest individual shareholder of Fermi Inc., is soliciting agent designations to call a special meeting of shareholders to elect a new board. He proposes 7 independent nominees (Daglio, Elson, Jimenez, Yang, Hooda, Pujadas) to restore governance and evaluate strategic alternatives including a change of control process. Neugebauer expresses confidence a tenant deal will be announced soon but argues the proxy is about governance, not the tenant.

About: Fermi Inc. engages in the development of private power campus for AI-centric customers in the United States. The company also develops, owns, and leases grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing campuses; develops and operates integrated power generation and computing infrastructure. It also engages in acquisition of land, permitting, construction, and long-term leases.

  • Announced: 2026-06-25

item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Murchinson/Oramed group; EGM July 31

Faces a contested extraordinary general meeting on July 31, 2026, called by a group led by Murchinson Ltd. and Oramed Pharmaceuticals Inc. The agenda includes a non-binding advisory vote on continuing the strategic alternatives review (Proposal 1, board recommends FOR), declassifying the board (Proposal 2, board recommends FOR), and four proposals from the dissidents: adding new articles (Proposals 3 & 4, board recommends AGAINST), removing three directors (Proposal 5, board recommends AGAINST), and electing three new directors (Proposal 6, board recommends AGAINST). The board urges shareholders to vote on the WHITE proxy card.

item.description:
Acquired by Colony Bankcorp for $19.75 cash or 0.94 CBAN shares; close Q4 2026

First Reliance Bancshares (FSRL) signed a definitive merger agreement to be acquired by Colony Bankcorp (CBAN) in a stock-and-cash transaction valued at approximately $163 million. Each FSRL share may elect $19.75 cash or 0.94 CBAN shares, subject to proration such that 20% of shares receive cash and 80% receive stock. The transaction, unanimously approved by both boards, is expected to close in Q4 2026, pending regulatory and shareholder approvals.

About: First Reliance Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for First Reliance Bank that provides banking products and services in North and South Carolina. item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · IONS
item.ns0:headline: FDA approves TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) for sHTG; first approved therapy to reduce acute pancreatitis risk
item.description:
FDA approves TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) for sHTG; first approved therapy to reduce acute pancreatitis risk

Announced FDA approval of TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) as an adjunct to diet to reduce triglycerides and the risk of acute pancreatitis in adults with severe hypertriglyceridemia (sHTG, TG ≥500 mg/dL). Approval based on Phase 3 CORE/CORE2 studies showing up to 72% triglyceride reduction and up to 91% reduction in acute pancreatitis events. TRYNGOLZA is Ionis' first independent commercial launch in a prevalent condition; product available in 50 mg or 80 mg monthly autoinjector, with U.S. launch expected in July 2026.

About: Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a commercial-stage biotechnology company, provides RNA-targeted medicines in the United States. The company offers TRYNGOLZA reduces triglyceride levels in adults with familial chylomicronemia syndrome (FCS) and acute pancreatitis; DAWNZERA for prophylaxis to prevent attacks of hereditary angioedema in adults; WAINUA for the treatment of the polyneuropathy of hereditary transthyretin-medicated amyloidosis (ATTRv-PN) in adults; and SPINRAZA for pediatric and adult pat…

item.description:

The company holds interests in the Round Top Mountain located near Sierra Blanca, Texas.

item.ns0:headline: Seeks court approval to cut Series D conversion price from NIS165 to NIS75.95
item.description:
Seeks court approval to cut Series D conversion price from NIS165 to NIS75.95

Filed a petition with the Israeli District Court to authorize a meeting of Series D convertible debenture holders to approve reducing the conversion price from NIS165 (~$55.7) to NIS75.95 (~$25.6) per share. If approved, the debentures (due Dec 31, 2026) would become convertible into 816,326 ordinary shares, up from 375,757. The reduction is subject to court approval, debenture holder approval, and NYSE American listing approval; timing is uncertain.

About: Ellomay Capital Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the initiation, development, construction, and production of renewable and clean energy projects in Europe, the United States, and Israel. The company owns photovoltaic (PV) plants comprising five PV plants in Spain. It also engages in the operation of a dual-fuel operated power plant in Ashkelon, Israel; and construction of a hydro power plant in the Manara Cliff, Israel. In addition, it operates anaerobic digestion plants.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · SPRO
item.ns0:headline: FDA approves Utebzi for cUTIs; first oral carbapenem
item.description:
FDA approves Utebzi for cUTIs; first oral carbapenem

Announced FDA approval of Utebzi (tebipenem pivoxil) for complicated urinary tract infections in adults with limited oral options. This is the first oral carbapenem antibiotic approved in the US, based on the PIVOT-PO trial showing non-inferiority to IV treatment. The drug was developed under GSK's exclusive license and is expected to be available by end of 2026.

About: Spero Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on identifying and developing novel treatments for multi-drug resistant (MDR) bacterial infections and rare diseases in the United States. The company’s product candidates include Tebipenem HBr (tebipenem pivoxil hydrobromide), an oral carbapenem-class antibiotic to treat complicated urinary tract infections, including pyelonephritis for adult patients, which has completed second Phase 3 trial.

  • Announced: 2026-06-17

item.ns0:headline: Faces hostile bid from GameStop; Cohen confirms no denial
item.description:
Faces hostile bid from GameStop; Cohen confirms no denial

Ryan Cohen, CEO of GameStop, confirmed in a June 19 interview that he is not giving up on acquiring eBay and may take the proposal directly to shareholders for a hostile takeover. He stated 'It's not a denial' and that the fate of the business will be decided by shareholders. The unsolicited bid remains active.

About: eBay Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates marketplace platforms that connect buyers and sellers in the United States, the United Kingdom, China, Germany, and internationally. Its marketplace platform includes its online marketplace at ebay.com, off-platform businesses, and the eBay suite of mobile apps. The company’s platforms enable users to list, sell, buy, and pay various products. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Comstock's Nevada mining assets for $20M cash + 2M shares + $7M deferred
item.description:
Acquires Comstock's Nevada mining assets for $20M cash + 2M shares + $7M deferred

Mackay Gold & Silver Corp. acquires 100% of Comstock Inc.'s Nevada mining assets (Silver City Lode properties) for US$20M cash and 2M common shares at closing, plus US$7M payable within 18 months in cash/shares. The deal consolidates the largest land package in Comstock District history (4,343 ha), adding two oxide gold-silver deposits (Lucerne and Dayton) with historical resources and a permitted heap-leach/Merrill-Crowe processing facility. Mackay has over US$60M cash to fund the acquisition and ongoing exploration.

About: Mackay Gold & Silver Corp. engages in the exploration of gold and silver mines in Nevada's Comstock district. The company is based in Vancouver, Canada.
